description: Routine should produce an architecture review with verdict (one of 4), concerns ranked by severity, strengths section, and an alternative if rejecting.

input_ticket.title: Review: proposed Redis-backed session cache for SIA
input_ticket.description: Proposal from backend engineer: add a Redis cache in front of agent_memory queries to reduce p95 latency. Linked Notion doc has full design. Please review against the app's architecture characteristics (performance, operational simplicity, reliability) and give a verdict.

smoke_questions: Is the verdict one of the four defined values — not a nuanced dodge?
Does each concern have a severity (Catastrophic / Major / Minor / Cosmetic)?
Are there at least 2 strengths listed (not empty)?
If verdict is 'Reject', is an alternative direction described?
Do Blocking/Major concerns each include a suggested resolution, not just criticism?
success_criteria: Verdict present + strengths non-empty + every blocking concern has resolution + at least 3 concerns total
